pack_purpose: Deterministic narrow follow-up pack for targeted escalation. It defines the crux questions and operational budgets, while source choice may remain model-driven within runtime-enforced tool guardrails.
verification_questions: Does the latest available information materially change the decision, given: BTC can move several percent in days and the contract resolves on one exact minute on April 20.?
How decision-relevant is the remaining contract/source-of-truth ambiguity: Binance website/display-surface implementation at the exact resolving minute is not fully specified beyond rules text?
Are the current blockers still material to final judgment: No strong independent verification of short-horizon downside probability beyond spot-distance reasoning?
Is the main verification gap still decision-material: No independent volatility study or same-day minute-fragility evidence was added beyond spot/rules verification.?

structured_handoff_focus.contract_ambiguity_reason: Binance website/display-surface implementation at the exact resolving minute is not fully specified beyond rules text
structured_handoff_focus.verification_gap_summary: No independent volatility study or same-day minute-fragility evidence was added beyond spot/rules verification.
structured_handoff_focus.best_countercase_summary: A plausible 5-6% downside move or Binance-specific dislocation into the exact resolving minute could still flip the market to No.
structured_handoff_focus.main_reason_for_disagreement: How much to discount current spot cushion for exact-minute settlement fragility.
structured_handoff_focus.resolution_mechanics_summary: Yes requires the Binance BTC/USDT 12:00 PM ET 1-minute candle on April 20 to have a final Close strictly above 70,000.
structured_handoff_focus.freshness_driver: BTC can move several percent in days and the contract resolves on one exact minute on April 20.
decision_blockers: No strong independent verification of short-horizon downside probability beyond spot-distance reasoning
Single-minute Binance-only settlement leaves residual operational and path-risk fragility
Any meaningful move back toward 71k-70k before April 20 would quickly change the estimate

supporting_persona_summaries.main_thesis: The market is mostly efficient: Binance BTC/USDT is currently comfortably above 70k, so Yes should be favored, but the exact noon-ET one-minute-close mechanic merits a small discount versus the market's mid/high-80s confidence.
main_logical_chain: Start from the market's 84.5% prior and take it seriously because short-dated threshold markets often encode useful strike-distance information.
Verify the governing rules and exact settlement source: Binance BTC/USDT 1-minute candle at 12:00 PM ET on April 20.
Check the exact venue's current price and recent context; Binance spot is comfortably above 70k and recent closes are above the threshold.
Apply a modest discount for minute-specific, venue-specific settlement risk and normal BTC volatility.
strongest_supports: Direct Binance spot check showed BTCUSDT around 74,258, materially above the 70,000 threshold.
Recent Binance daily closes in the sampled window were all above 70,000.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract settles on one exact Binance 1-minute close at noon ET, so a single volatile minute can flip the result.
A roughly 6% drawdown from current spot would be enough to settle No and is plausible over six days in BTC.
unresolved_ambiguities: How volatile the exact noon ET minute is likely to be on April 20.
Whether any Binance UI/data-surface quirks could matter for practical settlement interpretation.
supporting_persona_summaries.what_would_change_view: I would move lower if BTC falls back toward the low-71k/high-70k area, if Binance-specific risks emerge, or if closer-to-resolution minute-level checks show materially higher noon-close fragility.
supporting_persona_summaries.timing_relevance: High: the market resolves in six days on an exact minute-close, and the ET-to-UTC conversion was verified as 2026-04-20 16:00 UTC.
supporting_persona_summaries.source_quality_view: Primary evidence quality is strong because Binance is the named settlement venue and Polymarket supplies the contract rules; independence is only medium because the core evidence is mechanically tied to the settlement source, with CoinGecko serving as a contextual cross-check.
